in_scope_files.execution_confirmed_by: Live DB precheck 2026-04-05 — views content_performance_daily, content_product_performance_daily, product_performance_daily, content_channel_split_daily, content_loss_daily confirmed present.

Functions tiktok_affiliate_resolve_actual_commission, tiktok_affiliate_rollup_status, tiktok_affiliate_map_business_bucket confirmed present.

Functions refresh_tt_content_cost_allocations, refresh_content_profit_attribution_summary, refresh_content_profit_layer confirmed present.

in_scope_files.role: Replaces content_order_analytics_daily_base with corrected status semantics (is_realized/is_open/is_lost). Adds traceability join keys.
in_scope_files.execution_confirmed_by: Live DB precheck 2026-04-05 — content_order_analytics_daily_base confirmed present with all 098-specific columns: import_batch_id, order_id, order_settlement_status, outcome_status, is_realized, is_open, is_lost, reported_commission_amount.

in_scope_files.role: Verification queries for migration-097. 8 checks including grain, allocation shape, cost conservation, profit formula, ROI.
Phase 3 refresh pipeline — populates profit summary for a given created_by UUID
Execution attempt log from 2026-04-03. Now stale — all migrations have since been applied from another session or machine.
in_scope_files.note: Untracked, not yet committed. STALE — NO-GO recommendation no longer reflects DB state as of 2026-04-05.
in_scope_files.stale_reason: Report dated 2026-04-03 stated no migrations had been executed. Live DB precheck on 2026-04-05 confirmed all 5 migrations (094-098) are fully applied. Report must be updated or superseded before being committed.

out_of_scope_files.reason: Alters public.sales_orders (seller-side SaaS core). Adds order_line_hash for TikTok cashflow import dedup. No relationship to content_order_facts or any content module table.
out_of_scope_files.execution_confirmed_by: Live DB precheck 2026-04-05 — sales_orders.order_line_hash column present. Backfill complete: 10,147 / 10,147 rows have a hash (rows_with_hash = total_rows).

out_of_scope_files.reason: Seller-side SaaS core: P&L, wallets, bank, expenses, COGS, reconciliation, inventory, team-shared visibility
out_of_scope_files.exceptions: migration-088 through migration-093 are team-shared and constraint hardening — still seller-side, not content module

relevant_migrations.previously_unverified_dependency_resolve: public.tiktok_affiliate_status_rank(text) confirmed present in live DB on 2026-04-05

corrections_vs_095: actual_commission_amount is settled-only (was total_earned_amount regardless of status)
is_failed uses order_settlement_status NOT IN known set (was NOT is_successful AND NOT is_cancelled)
is_loss_outcome is now order_settlement_status = ineligible only
Adds import_batch_id, order_id, order_settlement_status, outcome_status, is_realized, is_open, is_lost, reported_commission_amount to base view

irrelevant_migrations.reason: CORE_SELLER_SAAS — alters sales_orders. Zero overlap with content module tables or objects.
irrelevant_migrations.application_note: Confirmed applied. Backfill complete: all 10,147 rows in sales_orders have order_line_hash populated.

live_data_state.source: pg_stat_user_tables live row counts via npx supabase db query --linked

tables.note: One import batch — likely a test run
One staged row from the test batch
One summary row — matches the single fact row
EMPTY — no allocations exist because tt_content_costs is empty

true_blockers.description: tt_content_costs is empty — no cost data has been entered
true_blockers.impact: refresh_content_profit_layer() will produce summaries with zero costs. profit = commission_realized - 0 for all rows. ROI will be NULL for all rows. Cost allocation table remains empty.
true_blockers.resolution: Insert real cost records into public.tt_content_costs for each content_id with actual ads, creator, and misc costs before running the refresh pipeline.

true_blockers.description: Real affiliate import data has not been loaded — only 1 test row exists across the pipeline
true_blockers.impact: content_order_facts has 1 row. content_profit_attribution_summary has 1 row. All analytics views reflect a single test record, not real business data. Any verification against these views is not meaningful.
true_blockers.resolution: Run normalize_tiktok_affiliate_order_batch() against a real TikTok affiliate export file to populate the pipeline with actual order data.

true_blockers.description: refresh_content_profit_layer() has not been run against real data
true_blockers.impact: content_profit_attribution_summary reflects only the 1 test row. Profit, ROI, and cost allocation outputs are not validated against real volumes.
true_blockers.resolution: After loading real import data (BLOCKER_002) and inserting cost data (BLOCKER_001), call: SELECT * FROM public.refresh_content_profit_layer('<real_created_by_uuid>'); and verify output against verify-tiktok-affiliate-content-profit-layer.sql.

true_blockers.impact: The report's NO-GO recommendation no longer reflects DB state. Committing it as-is would create misleading documentation in git history.
true_blockers.resolution: Update PHASE3_DB_EXECUTION_REPORT.md to reflect that all migrations were confirmed applied on 2026-04-05. Then commit it along with all other untracked files.

true_blockers.description: psql is not installed — run commands in README-tiktok-affiliate-content-profit-layer.md are written for psql
true_blockers.impact: Documentation run commands will not work as written on this machine. Must use npx supabase db query --linked instead.
true_blockers.resolution: Either install psql or update the README run commands to use npx supabase db query --linked syntax.

next_actions.action: Load real TikTok affiliate export data into the pipeline
next_actions.detail: Run the normalization RPC against a real TikTok affiliate orders export. This populates tiktok_affiliate_order_raw_staging and content_order_facts with real rows.

next_actions.action: Insert real cost data into tt_content_costs
next_actions.detail: For each content_id that has real order data, insert rows with actual cost amounts. Cost types: ads, creator, misc. Currency must match the order currency. cost_date must match business date of the orders.

next_actions.action: Run the Phase 3 profit refresh pipeline against a real created_by UUID
next_actions.detail: After real import data and cost data are present, run the full refresh. This populates tt_content_cost_allocations and rebuilds content_profit_attribution_summary.

next_actions.action: Run verification queries against real data
next_actions.detail: Execute verify-tiktok-affiliate-content-profit-layer.sql against the live DB to confirm grain uniqueness, cost conservation, profit formula, ROI constraints, and unallocated cost visibility.

next_actions.action: Update PHASE3_DB_EXECUTION_REPORT.md to reflect actual DB state
next_actions.detail: The report's NO-GO is stale. Add a section documenting that live precheck on 2026-04-05 confirmed all migrations (094-098) applied. Do not delete the original content — it has historical value.

next_actions.action: Commit all untracked and modified files
next_actions.detail: Commit after PHASE3_DB_EXECUTION_REPORT.md is updated and verification passes.
